# clang trunk: unreachable in InlineAsm constructor during codegen of inline asm with embedded \0 in constraint string

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173900
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, crash, inline-asm, generated by fuzzer

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/5exM9sTYK

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Console
```console
Failure value returned from cantFail wrapped call
failed to parse constraints
UNREACHABLE executed at /root/llvm-project/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Error.h:779!
```

## Code
```c
int a, b, c;
void foo(void *x, void *y) {
  __asm__(""
          : "=&c"(a), "=&D"(b), "=&S"(c)
          : "r"(y), "fis\0"
                    "*.L_sfnames_b"
                    "\x25"
                    "Hue"
                    "RDS Signal Deviation"
                    "192.168.190.160"
                    "#"(y));
}
```

## Code
```c
int a, b, c;
void foo(void *x, void *y) {
  __asm__(""
          : "=&amp;c"(a), "=&amp;D"(b), "=&amp;S"(c)
          : "r"(y), "fis\0"
                    "*.L_sfnames_b"
                    "\x25"
                    "Hue"
                    "RDS Signal Deviation"
                    "192.168.190.160"
                    "#"(y));
}
```
